steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that the Beirut Stock Exchange's focus on local businesses "benefits investors and the local economy." This positive outcome reveals what the blank must represent.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank describes what local businesses do when the exchange "address[es] factors that help" them. The result "benefits investors and the local economy" — a positive outcome. Substitute each word into "factors that help local businesses ______":

A. Thrive means to prosper and flourish. "Factors that help local businesses thrive" directly explains why this focus benefits investors and the local economy. ✓

B. Disperse means to scatter or spread apart. Businesses dispersing would break up concentration — a neutral or negative outcome, not one that benefits the local economy.

C. Ebb means to gradually decline or recede. Helping businesses ebb would mean helping them weaken — the opposite of a benefit to investors.

D. Overspend means to spend beyond one's means. Factors that help businesses overspend would harm them financially — contradicting the positive outcome stated.

A is correct.
